layout.title: Moonlight | Egypt Premium Tours
layout.description: Discover the magic of Egypt with Moonlight's premium personalized tours in Cairo, Giza, Alexandria, and Nile Cruises.
layout.keywords: Egypt tours, Cairo pyramids, Nile cruise, private tours Egypt, Moonlight travel

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Read Moonlight's Terms of Service including booking conditions, cancellation policy, payment methods, refunds, and traveler responsibilities for tours in Egypt.
terms.intro: Welcome to Moonlight. By browsing our website, booking a tour, or using our services, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following Terms of Service. Please review them carefully before making any reservations.

booking.title: Booking and Payments
booking.currency: Currency: All transactions and tour prices are quoted and processed in US Dollars (USD) or Euros (EUR).
booking.paymentGateway: Payment Gateway: We utilize PayPal Business API for secure payment processing. By completing a booking, you also agree to PayPal's Acceptable Use Policy.
booking.confirmation: Confirmation: A booking is only considered final and confirmed once the full payment is successfully received by Moonlight, and the tour status is updated to "Confirmed" in your user profile on our website.

cancellation.title: Cancellation and Refund Policy
cancellation.intro: We meticulously plan our tours and secure commitments with local vendors in advance. Therefore, the following strict cancellation policy applies to all bookings:
cancellation.sameDay: Same-Day & 24-Hour Cancellations (No-Show): If you cancel your tour on the scheduled day, or less than 24 hours before the agreed start time (Local Egypt Time - EET), no refund will be issued (100% cancellation fee applies).
cancellation.advance: Advance Cancellations (More than 24 Hours): If you cancel your booking more than 24 hours in advance (Local Egypt Time - EET), a refund will be issued, minus a 15% cancellation fee. This fee covers non-refundable transaction processing fees and administrative scheduling costs.
cancellation.forceMajeure: Force Majeure: In the rare event that Moonlight must cancel a tour due to extreme weather, security concerns, or unexpected closure of archaeological sites, a full refund or an alternative date will be offered.

refunds.title: Refund Processing
refunds.text1: All approved refunds will be processed back to the original method of payment (via PayPal).
refunds.text2: Please note that it may take several business days for the refunded amount to reflect in your account, depending on your bank or credit card provider's policies.

itinerary.title: Itinerary and Route Changes
itinerary.text: Moonlight reserves the right to slightly alter tour itineraries, routes, or timings without prior notice if required by local authorities, traffic conditions, or other operational necessities, ensuring the overall quality of the tour is maintained.

insurance.title: Travel Insurance and Health
insurance.text1: Flight delays, sudden illnesses, or personal emergencies occurring within 24 hours of the tour are not exempt from our cancellation policy. We strongly advise guests to purchase comprehensive Travel Insurance to cover such unforeseen events and claim any losses through their insurance provider.
insurance.text2: Moonlight is not liable for any injuries, illnesses, or loss of personal property that occur during the tours.

conduct.title: Code of Conduct
conduct.text: We expect all guests to respect Egyptian laws, cultural norms, and historical monuments. We reserve the right to refuse service or terminate a tour prematurely, without a refund, if a guest's behavior is deemed illegal, highly disruptive, or disrespectful to local heritage.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Learn how Moonlight collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you inquire about or book tours in Egypt through our website.
privacy.intro: At Moonlight, one of our main priorities is the privacy of our visitors. This Privacy Policy document contains types of information that is collected and recorded by Moonlight and how we use it.

collect.title: Information We Collect
collect.intro: We only collect personal information that you voluntarily provide to us when you inquire about our services or book a tour. This may include:
collect.contact: Contact Data: Email address and phone number (WhatsApp).
collect.travel: Travel Data: Preferences, dates of travel, and number of guests.

use.title: How We Use Your Information
use.intro: We use the information we collect in various ways, including to:
items: Provide, operate, and maintain our website.
Communicate with you to plan and customize your Egyptian tour.
Send you booking confirmations and essential travel updates.
Improve your experience on our website.

security.title: Data Security & Sharing
security.noSharing: No Third-Party Sharing: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes.
security.providers: Service Providers: Your data is only shared with essential service providers (e.g., Nile Cruise operators or hotel bookings) when necessary to fulfill your tour reservation.
security.protection: Protection: We implement standard security measures to protect your data from unauthorized access.

logs.title: Log Files
logs.text: Moonlight follows a standard procedure of using log files. These files log visitors when they visit websites. The information collected includes internet protocol (IP) addresses, browser type, and date/time stamps. These are not linked to any information that is personally identifiable.

rights.title: Your Data Rights
items: Request a copy of the personal data we hold about you.
Request that we correct any information you believe is inaccurate.
Request that we delete your personal data after your tour is completed.

consent.title: Consent
consent.text: By using our website, you hereby consent to our Privacy Policy and agree to its terms.

about.title: About Moonlight.. Your Guide to the Magic of Egyptian History
about.description: Discover Moonlight, your trusted guide for unforgettable tours across Egypt including Cairo, Giza, Alexandria, and Nile cruises. Experience the magic of Egyptian history with personalized travel experiences.
about.subtitle: Your Guide to the Magic of Egyptian History

who.title: Who We Are
who.text: At Moonlight, we don’t just offer tours; we take you on a journey through time. Born out of a deep passion for Egypt's magnificent history, Moonlight was created to provide a personalized travel experience that goes beyond the ordinary, making every visit to ancient landmarks a story to remember.

what.title: What We Do
what.intro: We specialize in organizing and managing bespoke tours within Egypt, focusing on the archaeological treasures and museums that defined civilization:
items: Cairo & Giza: Enchanting tours of the Great Pyramids, the Saladin Citadel, and world-class museums.
Alexandria: Exploring the 'Bride of the Mediterranean' and its unique Greco-Roman heritage.
Nile Cruises: A serene experience sailing the eternal Nile, surrounded by thousands of years of history.
Coming Soon: Expanding our horizons to the golden sands and magic of Luxor and Aswan.

why.title: Why Moonlight?
why.text: We believe that great travel is all about the details. We meticulously plan every step of your trip to ensure comfort, safety, and insightful discovery. Whether you are looking for an educational museum tour or a peaceful Nile cruise under the moonlight, we are here to make it happen with professionalism and heart.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.headline: Reach out to our concierge team to begin planning your bespoke Egyptian adventure.
contact.description: Contact Moonlight to start planning your personalized Egyptian tour. Our concierge team is ready to help you organize unforgettable experiences across Cairo, Giza, Alexandria, and the Nile.

success.subtitle: Welcome to an Unforgettable Journey
success.description: Your booking is successfully processed. You will receive an email with all the details shortly.

hero.title: Explore Egypt
hero.subtitle: Every Stone here has a story

sectionTitles.cairo: One City, Every Faith — It's Cairo
sectionTitles.alexandria: Where Alexander Left His Name, Alexandria

testimonials.mobileSubtitle: Experience our journeys through the stories of those who actually lived them
testimonials.desktopSubtitle: See how we’ve made every journey exceptional — straight from those who’ve traveled with us.

giza.title: Tutankhamun Golden Mask
giza.description: 5,000 treasures. Hidden for 3,000 years, guarded by Anubis himself. This mask was the last thing the world was meant to see — now yours to explore.

giza.title: Anubis
giza.description: Before you could reach the king, you had to pass him first. Sitting at the entrance of the Treasury — he wasn't just a guardian. He was the door.

giza.title: Canopic Coffinette
giza.description: Even in death, the king was never alone. His lungs, his liver, his stomach — each sealed in solid gold, embraced by goddesses. Because to be born again, nothing could be left behind.

cairo.title: The Hanging Church
cairo.description: Where the Holy Family once took refuge — Egypt's oldest church still stands to tell the story.

cairo.title: Ben Ezra Synagogue
cairo.description: Egypt's oldest synagogue. The walls that witnessed 850 years of history, still holding their secrets.

cairo.title: Muhammad Ali Mosque
cairo.description: Egypt's highest minarets. A dome that commands the Cairo skyline. Built by the man who shaped modern Egypt.

alexandria.title: Alexander the Great
alexandria.description: A Roman replica of a marble head of Conqueror of the Ancient World Alexander the Great.

nile.title: The Nile After Dark
nile.description: Sufi whirling, belly dancing, and open buffet — all while Cairo's lights drift past your window.

ticket.scanCode: Scan this code with your guide at pickup
ticket.errorDescription: We couldn't find the ticket you're looking for. Please check the URL or your profile.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Choose Us?
whyChooseUs.content: We deliver the perfect balance: an exceptional, high-quality travel experience in the heart of Egypt at unbeatable prices. Your journey with us is more than just a visit; it's a voyage through time led by elite, expert guides who bring history to life. Most importantly, we guarantee complete flexibility throughout your trip, allowing you to adjust your plans and explore at your own pace without any hassle. With us, your adventure is perfectly tailored to your comfort and your budget!

cancellationPolicy.title: Cancellation Policy
cancellationPolicy.content:
1. Cancellations made more than 5 days prior to the tour date are eligible for a refund, subject to a standard cancellation fee. Bookings canceled within 5 days of departure are fully non-refundable.

2. More than 5 Days Prior: Refundable (subject to standard cancellation fees). 5 Days or Less Prior: Fully non-refundable.

whatYouShouldKnow.title: What you should know
whatYouShouldKnow.content: We recommend bringing comfortable clothing, walking shoes, sunscreen, a hat, and your travel documents.

customItinerary.question: Can the itinerary be customized?
customItinerary.answer: Absolutely! All our trips are fully flexible. You can adjust the duration, hotels, activities, or add special experiences to match your interests and travel style.

deposit.question: Do I need to pay a deposit to confirm the booking?
deposit.answer: In most cases, only a small deposit is required to secure your reservation. The remaining balance can be paid before your arrival. We'll provide full payment details once you confirm your trip.

whatToBring.question: What should I bring with me on the trip?
whatToBring.answer: We recommend bringing comfortable clothing, walking shoes, sunscreen, a hat, and your travel documents.

reviews.title: Our Travelers Testimonials
reviews.subtitle: See how we've made every journey exceptional — straight from those who've traveled with us.
